case_title: GEOTECH CONSTRUCTION VS EGGLI, JOHN DBA EGGLI LANDSCAPE CONSTRUCTION INC.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EGGLI, JOHN DBA EGGLI LANDSCAPE CONSTRUCTION INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GEOTECH CONSTRUCTION AS TO DEFENDANT EGGLI, JOHN DBA EGGLI LANDSCAPE CONSTRUCTION INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLFT. CHANGED MIND ABOUT CERTIFIED MAILING. (VOIDED AND REFUNDED $10 CASH)
PLTFF'S EXHIBITS RETURNED,C/O MANUEL ENRIQUE ARCE: PROJECT MANAGER.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT EGGLI, JOHN DBA EGGLI LANDSCAPE CONSTRUCTION INC. DEFENDANT RAISED THE ISSUE THAT BOTH PARTIES ARE BOUND BY MANDATORY MEDIATION & BINDING ARBITRATION CLAUSES, #22 AND #15 UNDER PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S AGREEMENT SIGNED SEPTEMBER 5, 2003. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
